description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, angular design and a dark gray exterior. The aircraft features twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, two large turbofan engines mounted side by side, and swept-back wings with multiple hardpoints for external stores. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. The landing gear is visible and appears to be of the tricycle, retractable type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. Distinctive markings and insignia are present on the tail and fuselage, indicating military affiliation.
description: A dark gray, twin-engine military fighter jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward-mounted enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Rear view showing twin vertical stabilizers, dual engine exhausts, and the broad, angular wings.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the swept-back wing, external stores, and military insignia on the tail.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetry of the wings and stabilizers.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, with visible landing gear and external stores under the wing.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no visible winglets and moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turbofan engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers at the rear.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle, retractable landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy.
